title: HP W2210A 207A Original LaserJet Toner Cartridge, Black, Single Pack
features: Original HP Toner Cartridge – exceptional reliability and consistent print quality
For use with: HP Colour LaserJet Pro M255, MFP M282/M283 series
Recycle HP Original Cartridges for free with HP's Planet Partners Programme - 100 percent of Original HP Toner Cartridges contain recycled content
description: From the manufacturer True performance builds on superb reliability You can fully concentrate on your work, while we ensure flawless printing output. With Original HP Toner, you get superb reliability and smooth printing workflows.³ True performance leaves a small carbon footprint Printing with Original HP Toner means fewer reprints and less wasted paper.¹ ² With Original HP Toner, it supports responsible printing. True performance shows in exceptional quality Even the best concept needs a fine stage to shine. With Original HP Toner, you get premium print quality, vibrant colours, and crisp text. True performance gives peace of mind Using the right cartridge is an important element of a safe and sustainable working environment. With Original HP Toner, you get strict safety and eco standards so you can enjoy printing with peace of mind.⁴ HP Paper. The environmental choice. Original HP paper is designed with the environment in mind. When you use HP paper, you support responsibly managed forests. HP Printing Systems. The performance choice. Good things come in threes: For optimum printing results, use HP paper with HP printers and Original HP Toner. The HP Smart App. For your convenience. With the HP Smart App, your smartphone becomes the hub of your printing: Easily scan documents, order new toner, and print everything right from your phone. True performance comes from innovative technology We invest five years in engineering new toner cartridges. Because there are no shortcuts to excellence. With Original HP Toner, you know there is true science behind state-of-the-art printing. ¹ For Original HP toner cartridges, HP offers a free and easy recycling via HP Planet Partners. Programme availability varies ² 2018 Four Elements Consulting LCA study, commissioned by HP, compared Original HP 80A and 83A monochrome toner cartridges with asample of NBC alternatives across eight environmental impact categories. The LCA leverages a SpencerLab2016 study, commissioned by HP, comparing Original HP LaserJet toner cartridges with three brands of NBC toner cartridges sold in EMEA. ³ 2019 EMEA SpencerLab Monochrome Reliability study commissioned by HP ⁴ 2017 UL Blue Angel Indoor Air Quality compliance study, commissioned by HP. The study tested three remanufactured toner cartridge brands sold as substitutes for HP LaserJet Enterprise 500 Color M551 with cartridges: CE400A, CE401A, C402A, CE403A. The tests were carried out in compliance with the methods described in Appendix S-M of the RAL-UZ 171 Blue Angel award criteria. ⁵ HP calculations based on Energy Star normalized TEC data comparing the HP LaserJet 300/400 series and 500 series monochrome printers introduced in spring 2019. HP 58/59/76/77A/X compared to HP 26A/X, and HP 89A/X/Y compared to HP 87A/X.
